LoginPage.headline: Write your book the way it deserves to be written
LoginPage.subheadline: AI agents collaborate with you — planning, drafting, editing — while your voice stays at the center.
features: AI agents that think, outline, and write

AuthForm.signInSubtitle: Sign in to continue your story.
AuthForm.registerSubtitle: Create your account and begin your first book.

BooksPage.noBooksSubtitle: You haven't written anything yet — start your first story.

BookCard.deleteConfirmPrefix: Are you sure you want to delete

sections.mainTooltip: Basic parameters that shape the overall tone and direction of the book. They are passed to the AI on every chapter generation.
sections.charactersTooltip: Key people in your story. The AI uses their names, roles, and traits to keep behavior consistent across chapters and avoid contradictions.
sections.worldTooltip: Describes where the story takes place. The AI references this to write consistent setting details, sensory descriptions, and place names.
sections.plotTooltip: The backbone of your story. The AI uses this arc to escalate tension correctly and steer each chapter toward the resolution.
sections.chapterSummariesTooltip: Auto-generated by AI after each chapter. You can edit them to adjust context for future chapters — but keep them accurate and non-empty.

fields.genreTooltip: Defines the narrative framework. Affects vocabulary, pacing, and plot conventions the AI follows.
fields.targetAudienceTooltip: Sets the reading level, complexity of language, and thematic depth. A children's audience gets simpler sentences; adults get nuanced subtext.
fields.writingStyleTooltip: Controls sentence structure, rhythm, and descriptiveness. E.g. 'Minimalist' produces short punchy prose; 'Lyrical' produces rich, image-heavy writing.
fields.languageTooltip: The language the generated chapters will be written in.
fields.worldTooltip: The physical and social setting — geography, era, technology level, culture. The more specific, the more grounded the writing.
fields.worldPlaceholder: Describe the world where the story takes place
fields.atmosphereTooltip: The emotional tone of the environment — dread, wonder, nostalgia. Shapes word choice and sensory details in every scene.
fields.atmospherePlaceholder: e.g. Dark and gritty, Whimsical and lighthearted
fields.premiseTooltip: The 'what if' that starts everything. Sets expectations for the reader and tells the AI what kind of story this is.
fields.premisePlaceholder: The central idea or starting situation of the story
fields.conflictTooltip: The core obstacle or struggle. Drives chapter-to-chapter tension and determines what the protagonist must overcome.
fields.conflictPlaceholder: The main struggle or tension driving the story
fields.resolutionTooltip: How the conflict ends. The AI uses this as a target state — it won't write chapters that make the resolution impossible.

chapterSummaries.empty: No chapters generated yet. Summaries will appear here automatically after each chapter is written.
chapterSummaries.warningText: Editing a summary changes the context the AI uses for all future chapters. This may affect the direction and consistency of your story.
